_comment: Workflow recipes — composite chains that run several skills in sequence, passing each output forward as context for the next. Single source of truth: consumed by the slash commands (commands/<command>.md), the MCP server (list_workflows/get_workflow), and WORKFLOWS.md. Each step names an existing skill in skills/<skill>/SKILL.md.

workflows.name: Ship a Feature
workflows.summary: Take a raw feature idea from fuzzy brief all the way to a launch plan, end to end.

steps.produces: a sharp problem statement and scoped boundaries
a full PRD with goals, requirements, and success metrics
a RICE score positioning this work against alternatives
where this sits on the roadmap and the story around it
a launch plan: audience, messaging, channels, and timeline

workflows.name: Close the Quarter
workflows.summary: Turn the quarter's raw numbers into a leadership-ready story and board deck.

steps.produces: the metric tree and what actually moved
why customers left and what is avoidable
a tight leadership briefing of the quarter
a slide-by-slide board deck storyline

workflows.name: Launch a Product
workflows.summary: Go from competitive landscape to positioning to a fully checklisted launch and press release.

steps.produces: the competitive map and gaps to exploit
positioning, value props, and messaging pillars
the GTM plan across audience and channels
an owner-by-owner launch readiness checklist
the announcement press release

workflows.name: Rescue an Account
workflows.summary: Diagnose an at-risk customer and build the full save play through to renewal.

steps.produces: a health score with the specific risk drivers
the root cause and whether the risk is avoidable
an internal escalation brief for the save
the renewal strategy and negotiation plan

workflows.name: Run Discovery
workflows.summary: From a vague opportunity to validated insight and a prioritised next step.

steps.produces: a one-page problem brief from the fuzzy opportunity
a screener and discussion guide for user interviews
themes and insights from the research
a ranked, defensible list of what to do next
